CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationConfigurable.kt$AutomationConfigurable$( planKey = key, displayName = name.ifBlank { key }, defaultStages = parsedStages, lastModified = System.currentTimeMillis() )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationConfigurable.kt$AutomationConfigurable$("Docker Tag Key and Bamboo Plan Key are auto-detected from bamboo-specs and shown in Settings \u2192 Repositories.")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = "$planKey-$buildNumber", reason = "CI build failed ($planKey #$buildNumber)" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = buildKey, reason = "Build $buildKey has no 'Unique Docker Tag' in log" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = null, reason = "Could not detect current git branch" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = null, reason = "No CI build found for branch '$branch'" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = null, reason = "Not configured — set $missing in Settings" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = false, tag = null, buildKey = resultKey, reason = "Could not fetch build log for $resultKey" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModels.kt$TagDetectionResult.Companion$( detected = true, tag = tag, buildKey = buildKey, reason = "Detected from build $buildKey" )
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(5, terminal.size, "TERMINAL should have exactly 5 entries: COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED, FAILED_TO_TRIGGER, TAG_INVALID")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(terminal.contains(QueueEntryStatus.CANCELLED), "CANCELLED must be terminal — user-initiated cancel transitions to this state")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(terminal.contains(QueueEntryStatus.COMPLETED), "COMPLETED must be terminal — Bamboo Successful or Unknown/NotBuilt")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(terminal.contains(QueueEntryStatus.FAILED), "FAILED must be terminal — Bamboo Failed outcome (PR 8)")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(terminal.contains(QueueEntryStatus.FAILED_TO_TRIGGER), "FAILED_TO_TRIGGER must be terminal — set when doTrigger fails on Bamboo")

ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationModelsTest.kt$AutomationModelsTest$(terminal.contains(QueueEntryStatus.TAG_INVALID), "TAG_INVALID must be terminal — pre-L3 SQLite rows must not be re-queued on recovery")

ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Bamboo reconcile for $planKey (isRefresh=$isRefresh): " + "${baselineResult.diagnostics.buildsQueried} builds queried, " + "${baselineResult.diagnostics.buildsWithDockerTags} parseable, " + "selected=${baselineResult.selectedBuild?.buildNumber}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Docker tag detection from event: detected=${tagDetection.detected}, tag=${tagDetection.tag}, reason=${tagDetection.reason}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Dropping stale enable result for $branchKey (suite changed to $currentSuitePlanKey)")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Ignoring BuildLogReady for chain '${event.chainKey}' — does not match focused chain '$focusedChainKey'")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Reconcile tag detection: chainKey='$chainKey', detected=${tagDetection?.detected}, tag=${tagDetection?.tag}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] Tag detection via chainKey='$chainKey': detected=${tagDetection?.detected}, tag=${tagDetection?.tag}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] onTriggerDefault: no (or stale) saved default for $suitePlanKey — opening customize dialog")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$("[Automation:UI] onTriggerDefault: using saved default stages=${action.stages} for $suitePlanKey")

ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest.kt$AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest$(action is TriggerDefaultAction.EnqueueWith, "Must NOT enqueue when stage fetch fails — faulty fallback is worse than no data")
ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest.kt$AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest$(action is TriggerDefaultAction.EnqueueWith, "Partial intersection → should EnqueueWith the valid subset")

ArgumentListWrapping:AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest.kt$AutomationPanelTriggerDefaultTest$(action is TriggerDefaultAction.FetchError, "Fetch failure must return FetchError, NOT EnqueueWith or OpenCustomizeDialog. Got: $action")

ArgumentListWrapping:BaselineCacheServiceTest.kt$BaselineCacheServiceTest$(inMemory, onDisk, "Disk must hold the latest in-memory snapshot, not a stale one")
ArgumentListWrapping:BaselineCacheServiceTest.kt$BaselineCacheServiceTest$(svc.get("NON-EXISTENT"), "get after no-op invalidate must still return null")
ArgumentListWrapping:BranchSelectorSettleTest.kt$BranchSelectorSettleTest$(BranchSettleAction.Ignore, action, "A second settle while the async enable is running must not stack another dialog")

ArgumentListWrapping:BranchSelectorSettleTest.kt$BranchSelectorSettleTest$(BranchSettleAction.Ignore, action, "If the settled branch is already the committed one, the user didn't pick a new disabled branch")

ArgumentListWrapping:BranchSelectorSettleTest.kt$BranchSelectorSettleTest$(BranchSettleAction.Ignore, action, "While the dropdown is open the selection is transient — must NOT prompt (the reported bug)")
ArgumentListWrapping:BranchSelectorSettleTest.kt$BranchSelectorSettleTest$(action is BranchSettleAction.PromptEnable, "Deliberate pick of a disabled branch should prompt, got $action")

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanel.kt$MonitorPanel.Companion$( queueId = queueEntry.id, suiteName = suiteName, planKey = queueEntry.suitePlanKey, resultKey = resultKey, status = "Cancelled", bambooUrl = bambooUrl, isTerminal = true, // CANCELLED bucketed under Failed — terminal-not-success. See visibleEntries() KDoc. filterBucket = MonitorFilter.FAILED )

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanel.kt$MonitorPanel.Companion$( queueId = queueEntry.id, suiteName = suiteName, planKey = queueEntry.suitePlanKey, resultKey = resultKey, status = "Queued", bambooUrl = bambooUrl, isTerminal = false, filterBucket = MonitorFilter.QUEUED )

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanel.kt$MonitorPanel.Companion$( queueId = queueEntry.id, suiteName = suiteName, planKey = queueEntry.suitePlanKey, resultKey = resultKey, status = "Running", bambooUrl = bambooUrl, isTerminal = false, filterBucket = MonitorFilter.RUNNING )

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanel.kt$MonitorPanel.Companion$( queueId = queueEntry.id, suiteName = suiteName, planKey = queueEntry.suitePlanKey, resultKey = resultKey, status = "Successful", bambooUrl = bambooUrl, isTerminal = true, filterBucket = MonitorFilter.COMPLETED )

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanel.kt$MonitorPanel.Companion$( queueId = queueEntry.id, suiteName = suiteName, planKey = queueEntry.suitePlanKey, resultKey = resultKey, status = queueEntry.status.name, bambooUrl = bambooUrl, isTerminal = queueEntry.status in QueueEntryStatus.TERMINAL, filterBucket = if (queueEntry.status in QueueEntryStatus.TERMINAL) MonitorFilter.FAILED else MonitorFilter.QUEUED )

ArgumentListWrapping:MonitorPanelRunEntryTest.kt$MonitorPanelRunEntryTest$("Stage 'Integration Tests' failed", runEntry.errorMessage, "FAILED entry must forward errorMessage")

ArgumentListWrapping:PollingLifecycleTest.kt$PollingLifecycleTest$(null, lifecycle.currentJobForTest, "tryExit must atomically clear state so the next startIfNeeded launches")
ArgumentListWrapping:PollingLifecycleTest.kt$PollingLifecycleTest$(secondJob, lifecycle.currentJobForTest, "tryExit must not touch the slot when self does not match")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Build finished for entry ${entry.id}, resultKey=$resultKey, passed=$passed → $terminalStatus")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Build in Unknown/NotBuilt state for entry ${entry.id}, treating as COMPLETED")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Enqueued build with $serviceCount services, position: $position, suite='${entry.suitePlanKey}', entryId=${entry.id}")

ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Failed to auto-trigger entry ${entry.id} for suite '${entry.suitePlanKey}' (${errorType?.name ?: "no error type"}): ${triggerResult.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Failed to cancel build $resultKey on Bamboo (continuing with local CANCELLED): ${cancelResult.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Failed to stop build $resultKey on Bamboo (continuing with local CANCELLED): ${stopResult.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Fast-path trigger for entry ${entry.id} (queue was empty and Bamboo is idle)")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Queue depth limit reached for suite '${entry.suitePlanKey}' (max=$maxDepthPerSuite), rejecting entry ${entry.id}")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Transient trigger failure for entry ${entry.id} (${errorType?.name}); will retry on next poll tick: ${triggerResult.summary}")

ArgumentListWrapping:QueueService.kt$QueueService$("[Automation:Queue] Triggering build for entry ${entry.id}, suite='${entry.suitePlanKey}', branch='${entry.branchKey ?: "<master>"}', stages=${entry.stages ?: "all"}")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$( QueueEntryStatus.WAITING_LOCAL, state[0].status, "Non-empty getRunningBuilds must keep entry in WAITING_LOCAL — Bamboo is busy" )

ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$( QueueEntryStatus.WAITING_LOCAL, state[0].status, "Transient SERVER_ERROR must NOT mark the entry FAILED_TO_TRIGGER — the poll loop should retry on the next tick" )
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$( QueueEntryStatus.WAITING_LOCAL, state[0].status, "getRunningBuilds error must keep entry in WAITING_LOCAL — should not attempt trigger" )

ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$(ErrorType.AUTH_FAILED, result.payload, "triggerNow must forward the ErrorType payload from triggerBuild")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$(capturedStages[0], "doTrigger must pass null stages when entry.stages is null (run all stages)")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$(stages, capturedStages[0], "doTrigger must pass entry.stages to bambooService.triggerBuild")
ArgumentListWrapping:QueueServiceTest.kt$QueueServiceTest$(testService.stateFlow.value.any { it.id == "ok" }, "After a swallowed exception in a prior op, subsequent enqueues must still succeed")

ArgumentListWrapping:TagBuilderServiceTest.kt$TagBuilderServiceTest$(payload.contains("v2.4.0-sha1234"), "Payload must still contain full tag value")
ArgumentListWrapping:TagBuilderServiceTest.kt$TagBuilderServiceTest$(result.any { it.isCurrentRepo }, "No entry must have isCurrentRepo=true when featureBranchTag is null")

ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(1, active.size, "Only the WAITING_LOCAL row should be returned; got ${active.map { it.id to it.status }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(2, active.size, "Corrupt row must be skipped; only valid rows should be returned. Got: ${active.map { it.id }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(active[0].branchKey, "Pre-migration row must have null branchKey after upgrade (new column defaults to NULL)")
ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(active[0].branchKey, "null branchKey must survive persistence round-trip as null")

ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(coroutineCount * insertsPerCoroutine, active.size, "All ${coroutineCount * insertsPerCoroutine} entries must survive concurrent inserts")
ArgumentListWrapping:TagHistoryServiceTest.kt$TagHistoryServiceTest$(legacy!!.stages, "Old empty-array stages_json `[]` must rehydrate as null (run all stages), not an empty set")

ImportOrdering:AutomationConfigurable.kt$import com.intellij.openapi.Disposable import com.intellij.openapi.application.ApplicationManager import com.intellij.openapi.application.ModalityState import com.intellij.openapi.diagnostic.Logger import com.intellij.openapi.options.SearchableConfigurable import com.intellij.openapi.project.Project import com.intellij.ui.components.JBLabel import com.intellij.ui.components.JBScrollPane import com.intellij.ui.components.JBTextField import com.intellij.ui.dsl.builder.AlignX import com.intellij.ui.dsl.builder.COLUMNS_LARGE import com.intellij.ui.dsl.builder.bindText import com.intellij.ui.dsl.builder.columns import com.intellij.ui.dsl.builder.panel import com.intellij.util.ui.JBUI import com.workflow.orchestrator.automation.service.AutomationSettingsService import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.services.BambooService import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.settings.ConnectionSettings import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.settings.ConnectionStatusBanner import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.settings.PluginSettings import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.ui.ComboBoxWidth import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.ui.bindBoundedWidth import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.ui.StatusColors import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob import kotlinx.coroutines.cancel import kotlinx.coroutines.launch import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout import java.awt.BorderLayout import java.awt.Dimension import java.awt.FlowLayout import java.awt.Font import java.awt.GridBagConstraints import java.awt.GridBagLayout import javax.swing.BoxLayout import javax.swing.JButton import javax.swing.JComboBox import javax.swing.JComponent import javax.swing.JPanel import javax.swing.JSeparator

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** * The focused build from [WorkflowContextService] — drives docker-tag detection. * Null when no PR is focused or chain-key resolution failed. */ @Volatile private var currentFocusBuild: BuildRef? = null

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** The committed branch selection (null = default/master). Updated only when a selection is accepted. */ @Volatile private var selectedBranchItem: BranchComboItem? = null
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutomationModels.kt$QueueEntryStatus.TAG_INVALID$// Kept for backwards-compat with pre-L3 persisted SQLite rows.

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** * Baseline picker (PR 7 #8) — shows the auto-selected build + all parseable * alternatives. Selecting a different entry swaps the staged tags to that * build's `dockerTagsAsJson`. Hidden until at least one parseable build is * found; populated from [BaselineLoadResult.allRanked]. * * Declared before [baselinePickerRow] / [diagnosticPanel] because Kotlin * initializes properties in declaration order and the panel references it. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** Remembered alternatives so the combo listener can resolve the picked entry. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** The committed branch selection (null = default/master). Updated only when a selection is accepted. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutomationPanel.kt$AutomationPanel$/** True while a disabled-branch enable prompt/enable call is being handled, so overlapping settle events don't stack a second dialog. */
